workloads.answer:
The farmer started with 17 sheep. “All but 9 run away” means that only 9 sheep did **not** run away—so those 9 remain on the farm.

**Answer: 9**.
workloads.prompt: A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 run away. How many sheep are left? Think it through, then give the number.
